chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4421 of 2023 Mehboob Sher Versus Talha Naseem & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.20409/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.20410/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.12.2023 Mr. Zakir Hussain Bughio for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications with no orders as to costs. Judge Judge
